hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.scss$' && npm run lint:css -- "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(scss|html)$' && node ./scripts/check-violations.js "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
